# TypeScript Hello World Project

This is a simple TypeScript Hello World project set up with Node.js.

## Project Setup Progress

- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md file in .github directory
- [x] Project type clarified: TypeScript with Node.js
- [x] Scaffold the project
- [x] Install dependencies
- [x] Compile the project
- [x] Create and run build task
- [x] Launch the project
- [x] Ensure documentation is complete

## Project Ready

Your TypeScript Hello World project has been successfully set up with the following structure:

- `src/index.ts` - Main TypeScript file with "Hello, World!" console output
- `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript compiler configuration
- `package.json` - Project dependencies and build scripts
- `README.md` - Project documentation
